name: Microsoft Surface (Pro, Laptop, Studio) firmware family
description: Microsoft Surface devices ship UEFI firmware produced in-house by Microsoft Surface Firmware Team. Intel-based Surfaces use PTT; Arm-based Surfaces (Pro X / Pro 9 5G / Pro 11) use Microsoft Pluton.
platforms-note: CRTM version string encodes the Surface generation (e.g. 'SurfaceUEFI_1.2.1.0'). Combine with SMBIOS System Information Type 1 to identify the specific product line.
notes: Microsoft ships the only major consumer PC family with default BitLocker + optional Pluton. Pluton-equipped Surfaces report as Microsoft vendor ID (0x4D534654) for the TPM; Intel PTT-based Surfaces report as 0x494E5443. Surface UEFI + SEMM (Surface Enterprise Management Mode) allows enterprise lockdown of firmware settings per attestation.
source: Microsoft Surface enterprise deployment guide; observed CRTM strings from Surface Pro 8/9/10.
